violations.text: Sauces were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Inspector observed condensate from the walk-in cooler dripping onto a container of ricotta cheese. Containers were cleaned at time of inspection. PIC was advised that food may not be stored under sources of condensate drippage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Wood is used in the construction of small table in back prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizer bucket was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of : 1) Ceiling tiles (previous water damage) 2) Vents (dust/dirt) 3) Small prep unit (food residue) 4) Hoods (grease/soil residue) 5) Dishwasher Racks (black residue) New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Containers of food were observed stacked on top of each other in the cold hold units. The bottom of the containers were in contact with the product stored below it. Containers must not be stacked to prevent cross contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Food was observed stored uncovered in the cold hold units. Food must be covered to prevent contamination from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
